rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §29.0151, which governs appointment of surrogate parents for children with disabilities. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 29.0151. APPOINTMENT OF SURROGATE PARENT FOR CERTAIN CHILDREN.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses surrogate parent appointments, not property tax exemptions.
